raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a refrigerator from XXXX XXXX on my XXXX XXXX Citi card roughly 2 years ago. It was a part of deferred interest promotion. I mailed a check for the balance- {$3900.00} in XX/XX/XXXX. Citi has no record of receiving payment. I did not notice that there was no payment recorded until XX/XX/XXXX, when I also noticed that my account balance was {$1900.00} higher. 

They offer a 60- day grace period, which I missed by 2 days. 

I spoke to multiple people at Citi ; however, they refuse to refund the {$1900.00} in deferred interest. 

They told me that I took it as far as I could with the " escalation '' team and suggested I write to " Office of the President ''.
